initial_candidates.sql: SELECT ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk')) - (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Paulin Puel'))) * 100.0 / (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Paulin Puel'));

SELECT ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk')) - (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Paulin Puel'))) * 100.0 / (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) AS percentage_difference

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN pa.overall_rating END) - 
      MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN pa.overall_rating END)) * 100.0 / 
     MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN pa.overall_rating END)) AS percentage_difference
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name IN ('Ariel Borysiuk', 'Paulin Puel');

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk')) - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Paulin Puel'))) * 100.0 / 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) AS percentage_difference

SELECT 
    ((SELECT MAX(pa.overall_rating) 
      FROM Player p 
      JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
      WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk') 
     - (SELECT MAX(pa.overall_rating) 
        FROM Player p 
        JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
        WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) * 100.0 / 
    (SELECT MAX(pa.overall_rating) 
     FROM Player p 
     JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel') AS percentage_difference;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk')) - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Paulin Puel'))) * 100.0 / 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) AS percentage_difference

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (b.overall_rating - p.overall_rating) * 100.0 / p.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk')) b,
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) p

SELECT 
    (b.overall_rating - p.overall_rating) * 100.0 / p.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player b
    JOIN Player_Attributes ba ON b.player_api_id = ba.player_api_id
    JOIN Player p ON p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel'
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    b.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (SELECT pa.overall_rating 
     FROM Player p 
     JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' 
     ORDER BY pa.date DESC LIMIT 1) 
    - 
    (SELECT pa.overall_rating 
     FROM Player p 
     JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' 
     ORDER BY pa.date DESC LIMIT 1) 
    AS rating_difference;
